-- 1. Bảng nhân viên sales
create table sales (

);

-- 2. Bảng cấu hình trạng thái (Sales & CSKH)
create table status_configs (
  id text primary key,
  name text not null,
  bg_color text,
  text_color text,
  border_color text,
  sla_days integer,

  address text,

  general_notes text,
  tags text[],
  tax_code text,
  business_industry text,
  customer_group text,
  website text,

);

create table leads (
  id text primary key, -- Dùng text để khớp với logic 'lead_' + timestamp cũ, hoặc uuid
  phone text references customers(phone) on delete cascade,
  source text,
  assigned_to text references sales(id),

  cskh_status text references status_configs(id),
  service text,

);

create table notes (
  id text primary key,
  lead_id text references leads(id) on delete cascade,
  content text,
  created_by text references sales(id),
  created_at timestamp with time zone default now()
);
